Meet Carla

The Story Behind Keepsakes Bridal

24 years of couture craftsmanship, a calm approach to a stressful season, and a deep commitment to making every bride feel absolutely certain on her wedding day.

Carla Westerbeck Owner · Master Seamstress · FIDM Graduate
FIDM Graduate, 2003 · Practicing since 2001
Published in The Knot & Sacramento Bride & Groom
Preferred vendor · Multiple Sacramento boutiques
100+ brides served every year
Her Story

A Career Built on Craft, Care & Couture

Carla Westerbeck did not stumble into bridal alterations — she built her way there deliberately, beginning with a passion for fashion that led her to the Fashion Institute of Design & Merchandising, where she graduated in 2003. But her career in the craft started even earlier, in 2001, when she joined the team at Keepsakes Bridal while still attending fashion school.

For the next 24 years, Carla worked alongside the studio’s previous owner, Sylvia Guraydin, serving hundreds of Sacramento-area brides. When Sylvia retired in August 2025, there was only one person she trusted to carry the studio forward.

Today, as owner of Keepsakes Bridal, Carla brings the full weight of her FIDM training and two-plus decades of couture experience to every gown. What clients say most consistently is not just that the work was perfect — it is that Carla understood exactly what they wanted, even when they struggled to articulate it.

Book a Free Consultation View Our Work
What Makes Carla Different

Three Things Every Keepsakes Bride Experiences

01

She Gets It Without You Explaining It

Brides consistently say Carla understood their vision before they could find the words for it. That ability to hear what a bride means, not just what she says, is the rarest skill in this business.

02

She Keeps You Calm

Wedding planning is inherently stressful. Carla’s approach is intentionally unhurried and honest — she tells you what is possible, what the timeline looks like, and exactly what to expect.

03

She Delivers

With 24 years and hundreds of gowns behind her, Carla has encountered nearly every challenge a bridal gown can present — and knows how to solve each one with precision and skill.

Ready to Work with Carla?

Your first conversation is always a free consultation — no pins, no commitment, no pressure.
